/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libtrossen_widowx_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so -o libtrossen_widowx_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so CMakeFiles/trossen_widowx_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/trossen_widowx_interfaces/srv/detail/arm_mode__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/trossen_widowx_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/trossen_widowx_interfaces/srv/detail/joint_modes__functions.c.o CMakeFiles/trossen_widowx_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.dir/rosidl_generator_c/trossen_widowx_interfaces/srv/detail/control_gripper__functions.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
